title: How (not) to Build a School in Haiti
original_title: How (not) to Build a School in Haiti
overview: Development, history, and colonialism collide when a seemingly simple aid project spirals out of control in Haiti. Headstrong American Tim Myers clashes with Haitian leader Anselme Saimplice, forcing a reckoning on privilege and power.

trailers.title: Jack C. Newell of HOW (NOT) TO BUILD A SCHOOL IN HAITI, Talk/w Pat McDonald, HollywoodChicago, Pt 1
